title: Pet Retailer SKU & Brand Overlap Explorer
subtitle: Four-retailer match strictness (Pet Valu · PetSmart · Chewy · Amazon.ca)

L0.name: L0 — Exact barcode
L0.definition: Two SKUs match when they share the same barcode (UPC, GTIN-13, or GTIN-14) after normalizing packaging codes. This is the strictest level — the same physical item sold under the same identifier.
L0.example: Living World Green Botanicals Hay Cake 75 g shares UPC 080605653931 across Pet Valu, PetSmart, and Amazon — a true identical-SKU match.
L0.use_case: Use L0 for exact same-SKU price comparisons and inventory parity checks.

L1.name: L1 — Same product
L1.definition: SKUs match on the same brand, product line, target animal, category, format, and unit size. Flavor and texture may differ — chicken and salmon variants of the same line at the same weight are included.
L1.example: Blue Buffalo Wilderness 24 lb dog food matches across retailers whether listed as chicken or salmon, as long as brand, line, and pack size align.
L1.use_case: Use L1 for equivalent product comparisons when UPCs are missing or flavors differ.

L2.name: L2 — Comparable product line
L2.definition: SKUs match on brand, product line, animal, category, and format, with size normalized into comparable buckets (xs/s/m/l/xl). Different pack sizes of the same line can group together.
L2.example: Greenies Dental Treats in 12 oz and 27 oz pouches match when they fall in the same size bucket — useful for unit-economics comparisons.
L2.use_case: Use L2 to compare price-per-pound or assortment breadth across pack sizes.

L3.name: L3 — Same-brand comparable product
L3.definition: SKUs match when they share the same brand family, target animal, category, and format (dry, wet, treat, etc.), even if the product line differs. Hill's Science Diet and Hill's Prescription Diet dry dog foods group here.
L3.example: Hill's Science Diet Adult dry dog food and Hill's Prescription Diet i/d both match other Hill's dry dog listings at this level.
L3.use_case: Use L3 for brand-level shelf positioning — not for same-SKU pricing.
L3.includes: L0 + L1 + L2 + same-brand category matches.

strictness_examples.L0: Selecting L0 includes exact barcode matches only.
strictness_examples.L1: Selecting L1 includes exact barcode matches and same-product matches.
strictness_examples.L2: Selecting L2 includes exact barcode matches, same-product matches, and comparable product-line matches.
strictness_examples.L3: Selecting L3 includes all stricter levels plus same-brand comparable products (different product lines).

L3.brand: the new zealand natural pet food co.

L1.definition: Brand/sub-brand + base product line + animal + category + format + flavour + unit size + pack count

L2.definition: Brand/sub-brand + base product line + animal + category + format + unit size (flavour/texture/pack-agnostic)

L3.definition: Brand/sub-brand + base product line + animal + category + format + size bucket

L5.definition: Cross-brand substitute: animal + category + format + health line + size bucket
